instructions.heading: Repository Structure
instructions.rule: This is a monorepo managed with npm workspaces. All packages live in packages/* directory. Shared code belongs in packages/shared. Never duplicate code between packages.

instructions.heading: TypeScript Standards
instructions.rule: Use strict TypeScript mode. Enable all strict flags in tsconfig.json. Prefer type over interface for composability. Use explicit return types on all exported functions.

instructions.heading: Code Organization
instructions.rule: Follow feature-based folder structure. Group related files by feature, not by type. Keep index.ts files minimal - use them only for public API exports.

instructions.heading: Import Standards
instructions.rule: Use absolute imports via path aliases. Never use relative imports that go up more than one level (../..). Import order: external deps, internal packages, local files.

instructions.heading: Error Handling
instructions.rule: Use custom error classes extending Error. Include error codes and context. Never throw strings. Always type catch blocks as unknown and validate error shape.
